channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Xiaomi's HarnessX rewrites its own AI scaffolding mid-task — and smaller models gain the most
item.description: As enterprise AI agents take on increasingly complex, long-horizon tasks, their performance is often restricted by their harness, the software scaffolding that connects the backbone LLM to its environment. Currently, harnesses are largely static and hand-crafted. Improving them is largely manual and they do not automatically improve based on the execution data they collect from their environment.To address this engineering bottleneck, researchers at Xiaomi introduced HarnessX, a framework that treats the AI harness as a composable object and autonomously applies improvements to its code. In re...

item.title: I Met With China’s Top AI Experts. They’re Freaking Out, Too
item.description: The AI arms race between China and the US has researchers on both sides worried about a “Chernobyl moment.”

item.title: 'This is no longer science fiction, this is reality': The future of shipping could be the world’s smartest sticky label
item.description: Samsara’s new single-use, Bluetooth-enabled sticky label could help solve shipping woes for everyone.

item.title: GTA VI is a worrying sign for the future of physical games
item.description: Rockstar Games has finally given Grand Theft Auto VI a price ahead of the game's November 19th launch. But while announcing that the game would cost $79.99, Rockstar also confirmed that the physical versions of GTA VI won't include a disc, and instead will only contain a download code inside the box. Not only is […]

item.title: From route creation to free Pokémon apps, here are 3 cool things to do as soon as you buy your first Garmin
item.description: From creating your own local routes to walking to Mordor, here are three things to try with your first Garmin as soon as you get it.

item.title: Better than birdsong, this Birdbuddy Pro Prime Day Deal soars to new heights and takes you up close and personal with our feathered friends for less
item.description: Of all the gifts I've received over the years, Birdbuddy remains in my top 10. This Prime Day deal on the latest model should be at the top of your wishlist.

item.title: Hulu auto-quality settings are quietly downgrading your picture. Here's why
item.description: If you have a half-decent internet connection, you can probably turn "Data Saver" off.

item.title: Stanford researchers will discuss their agentic 'scientists' that are on course to reshape drug discovery at VB Transform 2026
item.description: Drug discovery is notoriously inefficient. Pharmaceutical projects span years, moving from one specialized human team to the next through disconnected workflows that result in knowledge loss during each handoff. A shocking 90% to 95% of drug discovery projects reportedly fail — one of the highest failure rates of any industry. A single successful drug can take over a dozen years and up to $1 billion from initial discovery to patient distribution, according to published reports. Generative AI is being used to solve some of the challenges, but Stanford researchers have moved the ball forward wit...

item.title: Want a $400 laptop on Amazon Prime Day? This Ryzen 5 7430U with 16GB RAM is the best deal I've seen so far — and now for even cheaper
item.description: If you’re looking for value for money, this Prime Day laptop deal could be the one for you.

item.title: I tested the Oura Ring 5 and loved it — but I can’t bring myself to recommend it over this record low Ring 4 deal
item.description: After testing the Oura Ring 5, it is a worthwhile upgrade over its predecessor — but the Ring 4 at a record low price is the much better buy.

item.title: Netflix is launching a new horror game by the developers of Oxenfree — and your phone is the controller
item.description: Netflix's new horror game Unhinged will be available to all subscribers and is a first-person home invasion story.

item.title: There are 63 new Grand Theft Auto 6 screenshots to pore over, giving us our first look at some of the key mechanics of the upcoming GTA game
item.description: What we learned from the latest batch of GTA 6 screenshots

item.title: What's better than the GTA 6 pre-orders going live? The LG C5 hitting a record-low price for Prime Day, that's what
item.description: The LG C5 has dropped to a record-low price in all its sizes at Amazon, but it's the 42-inch that steals the show.

item.title: Not sure if the new Meta Glasses co-designed by Kylie Jenner are for you? These 3 alternatives from Meta, XReal, and RayNeo are all on offer right now
item.description: The new Meta Glasses are sleek, stylish, and smart, but not all smart glasses are made equal. Whether you want entertainment streaming or a more familiar design, these are your best options

item.title: Honda is reportedly reviving the Element as an affordable hybrid
item.description: According to Automotive News, the cult-favorite Honda Element could return in 2029 as a small hybrid SUV.

item.title: Looking for the best smartwatch? The Apple Watch Ultra 3 is truly the king of wearables, and I'd upgrade to it for these 3 reasons alone
item.description: The Apple Watch Ultra 3 is our best overall smartwatch, and it's finally hit a record-low price thanks to Prime Day.

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy Ultra 2 is almost certainly coming soon, judging by the incredible 45% discount on last year's model — should you buy now or wait?
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra just hit a mammoth 45% off, and based on my many years of covering deals, I'm confident this will sell like hot cakes.

item.title: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day is now in its second day, and whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, there’s a good chance you’ll find a discount. The Apple Watch Series 11 has already dropped to a new low price, while the AirPods Pro 3 are discounted to $179. With Tim […]

item.title: ‘If AI is to help build a better ​future, it must be honest about what it costs us now’: UN urges AI giants to reveal full extent of environmental damage
item.description: AI companies should reveal the full cost on the environment, UN Chief says.

item.description: Find the best Prime Day deals of 2026 on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple Watches.

item.description: I've searched through Prime Day TV deals for the best offers on gaming TVs. Here are my picks, just in time for GTA 6 pre-orders.

item.title: Erling Haaland’s Snapchat is giving World Cup fans something else to cheer for
item.description: Erling Haaland is scoring goals for Norway at the FIFA World Cup, but his funny Snapchat posts have become their own viral moment.

item.title: The modern version of a fly trapped in amber: 3D printing your Gaussian Splat is one of the most amazing things I've seen in a long time
item.description: Want to DIY a perfect model of a local landmark to sit on your shelf in a 'dry snow globe' style? Now you can with a 3D-printed Gaussian Splat.

item.title: Lumysi hid an activity tracker in a bracelet because wearables are gauche, darling
item.description: It's a Kickstarter from an unknown brand that wants to offer a classier fitness tracker.

item.title: EcoFlow literally just dropped the price of this portable power station for Prime Day — our 5-star Delta 3 Plus is the perfect summer companion
item.description: My top-performing power station is finally on sale at Amazon, and it's the one you'll want for camping, road trips, and working outside this summer.

item.title: Google is finally opening the Play Store to outside payments
item.description: While the court still hasn't signed off on the massive settlement resolving Epic's antitrust lawsuit against Google for having a monopoly over Android's app store with Google Play, the tech giant says it will start rolling out changes to the way it handles billing for developers worldwide. As announced in March, the flat 30 percent […]

item.title: RTE assurait qu’il n’y avait « aucune inquiétude » : le lendemain, 100 000 foyers bretons étaient dans le noir
item.description: Si la France dispose d'une capacité de production suffisante pour passer l'été sans difficulté majeure, la canicule n'est pas sans conséquence pour le système électrique. Car au-delà de l'approvisionnement, les fortes chaleurs peuvent également fragiliser les équipements du réseau et provoquer des coupures localisées, comme c'est le cas dans le sud du Finistère depuis la soirée du 23 juin. ...

item.title: The Best Breville Espresso Machine Is 30 Percent Off Right Now (2026)
item.description: You can save hundreds of dollars on Breville appliances during Amazon Prime Day.

item.title: Prime Day deals under $50 that are really worth it
item.description: If you’re looking for a good deal without spending hundreds, Prime Day discounts have pushed some of our favorite products under $50. You can pick up everything from Nintendo Switch games to Bluetooth speakers while sticking to your budget. We’ll keep this post updated throughout the sale as we find new deals and low prices, […]

item.title: Installer SteamOS sur son PC : le guide complet, étape par étape
item.description: SteamOS n'est plus réservé au Steam Deck ni à la Steam Machine. Depuis la version 3.8, on peut l'installer gratuitement sur n'importe quel PC à carte AMD ou Intel. Voici le tuto complet, de la config matérielle à la configuration du système, avec les solutions pour les cartes Nvidia.

item.title: The $27 million Al proxy war over Alex Bores ends in a draw
item.description: The expensive, $27 million political proxy war between Anthropic and OpenAI came to a draw last night when Alex Bores, a New York state Assemblyman whose popularity surged after being targeted by a pro-AI super PAC, narrowly lost the Democratic primary to represent New York's 12th Congressional district. Prior to the race, Bores, a former […]

item.title: 'Deepfake as a service' sees 39% spike in dark web conversations — and experts fear it will fuel the next wave of “fake boss” scams
item.description: Businesses must prepare for what's coming by focusing on prevention and employee education.

item.title: Prime Day 2026 live: Were vetting the best Amazon deals in real-time
item.description: Get live updates on the first Prime Day of 2026. We found record-low prices on AirPods, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony headphones, and more.

item.description: We've rounded up the best Amazon Prime Day outdoor deals from brands like Yeti, Anker Solix, Solo Stove, LifeStraw, and more.

item.title: The top tech Prime Day deals to shop on day two
item.description: Welcome to day two of Amazon’s four-day Prime Day event, which, if we’re being honest, looks a lot like day one. That’s actually good news, though, because many of the best deals are still around, and some new ones have joined them. If you’ve got a Prime subscription, whether through a free trial or a […]

item.title: Facebook rolls out an AI companion app for creators
item.description: The new app, which is currently being tested with select creators, will have Facebook's recently launched AI creator assistant built into it.

item.title: PlayStation confirme que GTA 6 aura des temps de chargement quasi instantanés sur PS5
item.description: PlayStation affirme que GTA 6 n'aura quasiment aucun temps de chargement à sa sortie sur PS5. Une amélioration nette par rapport à GTA 5, l'un des plus mauvais élèves en la matière.

item.title: 'Real Alien Sh*t': US F15 pilot claimed to have seen a minefield of Iranian drones moving like 'jellyfish', perhaps thanks to meshed networking
item.description: US pilot describes Iranian drones forming coordinated jellyfish-like patterns during combat, sparking debate over advanced networking or misperception claims.

item.title: Free est le meilleur opérateur 5G+ d’Europe d’après Opensignal, mais sur quels critères ?
item.description: La 5G+ n'est pas encore la norme en Europe, mais ça n'empêche pas Free de se démarquer avec une expérience jugée la meilleure du Vieux Continent sur ce réseau mobile.

item.title: Deezer says its new feature lets fans remix songs with artist consent
item.description: Global music streaming service Deezer is taking a contrarian approach to AI, even as it adds a feature that lets fans remix songs.

item.title: How the modern CMO role prepares leaders for the CEO seat
item.description: A wider share of responsibilities puts the CMO in prime position. As I move from a CMO role into a CEO role, I’ve realized that the transition isn’t as unconventional as some expect. The modern CMO role has become one of the broadest leadership assignments in the C-suite. Yet the transition still surprises more conventional business thinkers because many still picture marketing as campaigns, messaging, and advertising, rather than enterprise strategy....

item.title: How Shopify built an AI stack that doesn't care which models survive
item.description:
Shopify built an LLM proxy that gives every engineer access to multiple AI providers — with automatic failover when any one of them goes down, changes, or disappears. When Claude Fable 5 shut down, Shopify's engineers didn't go into panic mode. The proxy shifted them to Claude Opus or GPT 5.5 automatically, without interrupting their workflows.
“Fable looks amazing; we used it of course,” Farhan Thawar, Shopify’s head of engineering, says in a new VentureBeat Beyond the Pilot podcast. “When a model comes and then it goes, or it could be as innocuous as an update, the proxy allows us to spray ...

item.title: 50+ of the best Prime Day tech deals, vetted by a tech editor on a budget
item.description: Mashable's tech editor found the best Prime Day tech deals of 2026. Get AirPods for $99, Kindles for $85, and save 50% on Bose headphones.

item.title: 'A compelling choice': Western Digital 1TB SSD that fits in your pocket is over 40% off for Prime Day — the perfect upgrade for rugged on-the-go storage
item.description: This Western Digital My Passport SSD is a bigger, faster alternative to portable storage - and it's cheaper than ever this Prime Day.

item.title: Riot now lets you enable its anti-cheat when you want to
item.description: If League of Legends and Valorant players have the right hardware and elect to opt into "pre-boot security mechanisms and Windows' own native protection features," then, starting today, they can switch the Vanguard anti-cheat software from always-on to one that's "on demand." With "Vanguard Pre-Check," the kernel-level driver won't launch when your system does, according […]...

item.title: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe: release date, new trailer, cast, and everything we know so far about The Big Bang Theory spinoff on HBO Max
item.description: What on Earth is Chuck Lorre up to this time? Stuart Fails to Save the Universe is the Big Bang Theory spinoff nobody expected — here's its release date, trailer, cast and more.
